sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99705" key="sundiaph/gnumai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνδια-πήγνῠμαι</orth>, Pass, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:115" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.115</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἂν οῦ)ν παγῇ</foreign> restd. fr. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> </bibl>).</entryFree>
